---
title: "Teaching"
output: html_document
---

<hr>

## Spring 2026 Courses

* STT 4812 Statistical Concepts and Applications II
* STT 5811 Statistical Concepts and Applications
* One-course release for being Statistics Director

## Fall 2025 Courses

* STT 1810 Basic Statistics (&times; 2)
* STT 4811 Statistical Concepts and Applications I

## Course Resources

* [AppState Posit Server](https://mathr.appstate.edu)
* [Desmos Studio](https://www.desmos.com/)
* [GitHub Course Repos](https://github.com/STAT-JET-ASU)
* [ISI 2nd Edition Applets](https://www.isi-stats.com/isi2nd/ISIapplets2021.html)
* [Tuva Labs](https://tuvalabs.com/)
* [WileyPLUS Login Page](https://education.wiley.com/)

## Statistics Applets

* [Adam Cunningham's Probability Playground](https://www.acsu.buffalo.edu/~adamcunn)
* [Matt Bognar's Applets](https://mabognar.github.io/apps)
    * Probability Distributions (iOS and Android)
* [Katie Schneider's Statlets](https://www.usu.edu/math/schneit/ctis)
* [Art of Stat Web Apps (Shiny)](https://artofstat.com/web-apps)
    * Art of Stat: Distributions (iOS and Android)
    * Art of Stat: Concepts (iOS and Android)
* [CPM Statistics Applets (Shiny)](https://stats.cpm.org)
* [Rossman Chance Applet Collection](https://www.rossmanchance.com/applets/index2021.html)
* [Stapplet](https://www.stapplet.com)
* [StatCrunch Applets](https://www.statcrunch.com/applets)
* [StatDistributions](https://www.statdistributions.com/normal)
* [StatsCalculators](https://www.statscalculators.com)
    * Includes some related R and Python code
* [The Calculator Site (Miscellaneous)](https://www.thecalculatorsite.com)


<hr>
